# API Surface

T-Stack has no traditional REST/GraphQL API. Its "API surface" consists of CLI commands, agent invocation points, and skill interfaces.

## CLI Commands (tstack-agents)

Entry point: packages/cli/bin/cli.mjs

| Command | Handler | Options | Description |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| init | lib/init.mjs -> init(cwd, { force }) | --force | Copy framework + initOnly files to project root, configure .gitignore |
| update | lib/update.mjs -> update(cwd, { dryRun }) | --dry-run | Hash-compare and copy changed framework files |
| version | inline | - | Print CLI version from package.json |
| --help | inline | - | Print usage help |
| --version | inline | - | Print CLI version |

### Exported Functions

#### init(cwd, options): Promise<number>
- Location: packages/cli/lib/init.mjs
- Returns: Exit code (0 = success, 1 = error)
- Behavior: Copies all files from framework + initOnly manifests to cwd. Validates path traversal. Handles symlink replacement. Manages .gitignore entries.
- Guards: Checks for existing installation (unless --force). Validates payload file existence. Path traversal protection.

#### update(cwd, options): Promise<number>
- Location: packages/cli/lib/update.mjs
- Returns: Exit code (0 = success, 1 = error)
- Behavior: For each framework file: computes SHA-256 hash of installed version, compares to manifest hash, skips unchanged, copies changed/new. Reports statistics.
- Guards: Checks for T-Stack installation (version.json or legacy .version). Path traversal protection.

#### Manifest Exports (packages/cli/lib/manifest.mjs)
- framework: string[] - Sorted list of framework file paths
- initOnly: string[] - Sorted list of init-only file paths
- frameworkHashes: Record<string, string> - Map of file path to SHA-256 hash
- version: string - Framework version string

## Agent Invocation Points

### User-Invocable Agents
- @orchestrator <request> - Primary entry point for all team work
- @scout <request> - Direct research and project scanning

### User-Invocable Skills
- /setup - First-time initialization
- /update - Post-update migration

### Sub-Agent Delegation Pattern
Orchestrator delegates via: "Run the agent as a subagent to complete this task: <task description>"

### Agent Tool Permissions

| Capability | Agents |
|:---|:---|
| Can write code (edit) | Developer, Tester, Code Health, DevOps, GitOps, Scribe |
| Can execute commands (execute) | Scout, Developer, Security Auditor, Code Health, DevOps, GitOps |
| Can invoke sub-agents (agent) | Orchestrator, Architect |
| Has web access (web) | Scout, Architect, Developer, Senior Engineer, Security Auditor, Code Health, DevOps |
| Has GitHub tools (github/*) | GitOps |

## Pre-flight Hook Interface

Hook config: .github/hooks/pre-flight.json
Script: scripts/pre-flight.mjs

Output format: JSON to stdout with continue (always true) and systemMessage fields.
Three message variants: PASS (versions consistent), WARN: run /setup (.migrated missing), WARN: run /update (.migrated < .version).

## Blackboard Interface

| File | Read By | Written By | Access Pattern |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| project.md | All agents | Scout | Read-first on any task |
| decisions.md | All agents | Scribe | Append-only |
| routing.md | All agents | Orchestrator, GitOps | Read-fresh-before-write (concurrency) |
| sprint-index.md | Orchestrator (rarely) | GitOps | Read-rarely, written on sprint completion |
| team.md / team.local.md | Orchestrator | User | Read on delegation decisions |
| .version | Pre-flight script | Framework update | Read on session start |
| .migrated | Pre-flight, /setup, /update | /setup, /update | Read/write on init and update |

## Version.json Manifest Format

Generated by scripts/generate-version.mjs. Contains version string, framework file-to-hash map, and initOnly file-to-hash map. Read by packages/cli/lib/manifest.mjs.
